Nevederia's Left Eye  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: RANGE PRIMARY SECONDARY
AC: 15
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +15 STA: +15 AGI: +15 HP: +50
SV MAGIC: +10
Focus: Mana Preservation III
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: ALL except BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Nevederia's Left Eye
Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: RANGE PRIMARY SECONDARY
AC: 15
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +15 STA: +15 AGI: +15 HP: +50
SV MAGIC: +10
Focus: Mana Preservation III
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: ALL except BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:Shield
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Mynlaeni
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-09 03:55:03
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 55
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Temple of Veeshan
NPC Name
Lady Nevederia


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Temple of Veeshan


Uploaded February 1st, 2022 by halfridge

Bolinko- Not sure where you got your info from, but it is still Mana Preservation 3. I got this item last night. 11/14/02

# Aug 03 2002 at 5:10 PM Rating: Default

2 posts
it has reanimation conservation on it now
▲ Page top
Right eye
QuoteReply
# Jul 24 2002 at 11:26 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592756975845
Scholar
31 posts
Well I've been a proud holder of her right eye for several months now - it's a very nice caster item, ranged, primary and secondary slots +mana etc...one would think they would put the focus effect on that eye since it is geared towards casters but noooooo...Verant seems to enjoy conflicts between classes.

Whereas the 4 or 5 of these that our guild has have all been the exclusive property of melee classes, it is unlikely a melee will ever see one again. Mana prev is just too damn important.

Oh, unless of course, a monk wants it ;)
▲ Page top
Now a focus item
QuoteReply
# Jun 06 2002 at 12:47 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592248944365
Scholar
139 posts
Well, this changes things doesn't it?

This has just become a well sought after Focus Item, assuming they didn't change the effect on this with last nights patch.

Focus Effect: Mana Preservation III
▲ Page top
RE: Now a focus item
QuoteReply
# Jun 08 2002 at 11:12 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1595780131429
464 posts
Hmmmm.... not a single caster stat (Mana, INT, CHA, or WIS guys, be honest), so they put MP3 on it...?

Am I the only one who thinks thats pretty friggin dumb?

If they are gonna add Focus Effects, at least they should do it to items that actually have caster attributes. This WAS a sweet Tank/Monk item. Now we will probably never see it...
▲ Page top
RE: Now a focus item
QuoteReply
# Jun 09 2002 at 1:07 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591750220513
78 posts
Are you Forgetting that there are Rangers Paladins ShadowKnights and Beastlords out there as well that Need those Stats and the Focus That comes on the Items Can help them as well as "pure" casters?
▲ Page top
RE: Now a focus item
QuoteReply
# Jun 14 2002 at 9:24 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758121968
53 posts
very well and dandy, but being a wizie, i've been wandering throught the focus item list, and there are not many focus items that i would actually trade my current gear for. The only one that I could name offhand is kedge robe, and i've been drooling over that anyhow. Of course it's used for the rogue epic if i remember correctly, so there's no way I will ever have a shot at that one. This whole focus item thing royally shafted wizzies. We got almost nothing good out of the whole deal.

▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: May 13 2001 at 10:08 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Monks need resist gear and mass-HP items at endgame levels, this is less useful than the Brain of Cazic Thule to me.
VERY disappointing
QuoteReply
# May 04 2001 at 10:59 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
For where this drops, it should blow away Cazic thule's brain, which just about anyone can get. FAR FAR FAR more difficult than Cazic thule, this item is sadly sub par.
▲ Page top
RE: VERY disappointing
QuoteReply
# May 10 2001 at 12:21 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591751504276
Scholar
73 posts
I kinda agree... in order to have me drooling, it would have to have DEX and HP, and/or some good saves on it... monks get almost nothing for good Range Slot items; especially in comparison to other classes. Monks NEED Hit Points and Resists at the level that this is obtainable.

Consider Idol of the Thorned, Ball of Velium, Summoned Shurikens, Kerran Toy- these ALL pale in comparison to things like Priceless/Primal Velium Bows, Brain of Cazic Thule, and (lol) Hand of the Master- which no other class has any problem carrying around the weight of those items.

-Thanks
▲ Page top
damn gena 8)
QuoteReply
# May 04 2001 at 8:26 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
im just glad VI didnt get ***** about this and toss mana/int/wis on that such a ***** when you guys roll for stuff that puts you over 200 we need as much of the first 4 stats that we can get. /cheer tank powa
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: May 09 2001 at 11:33 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Just a quick point. If you're this deep into ToV, you're not going to be in a pick up group. You're going to be in an uber guild on a raid, and uberguilds do NOT roll for such items, they are rewarded.
From Temple of Veeshan, not VP
